channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Denzel Curry, Galantis, Peking Duk and More Perform at BASSINTHEGRASS 2026 in Darwin
item.description: 🔥 Party in the Outback! Denzel Curry, Galantis, Peking Duk, and more set to light up BASSINTHEGRASS 2026 in Darwin 🎉 #MusicFestivalMadness

item.title: Dara’s ‘Bangaranga’ Wins Eurovision 2026 for Bulgaria
item.description: 🎉 Bulgaria brings the Eurovision crown home with Dara's infectious hit 'Bangaranga'! 🌟 #Eurovision2026 #BulgariaWins

item.title: Weekend Update’s Joke Swap Was Even More Brutal Than Usual
item.description: When jokes hit harder than a drum solo 🥁😂 Who else caught Weekend Update’s savage joke swap? 🤣 #WeekendUpdate #JokeSwap

item.title: Chad Smith Drumming With Paul McCartney On ‘SNL’
item.description: 🥁🎸 Get ready for an epic jam session on SNL with Chad Smith and Paul McCartney! Saturday night just got a whole lot funkier! 🎶 #SNL #MusicLegends

item.title: Australian Metalcore Band Ocean Sleeper Sign Global Deal With Rise Records/BMG
item.description: 🌊🎸 Big news Down Under! @OceanSleeperBand rocking the world with their new global deal! #MetalcoreRevolution 🌏🤘

item.title: Drake Is Spotify’s Most-Streamed Artist in a Day for 2026 Following Three-Album Release
item.description: 🔥 Drake reigns supreme on Spotify with non-stop hits! 🎶🚀 #Drake #Spotify #MusicNews

item.title: Fetty Wap Announces 2026 “The Nostalgia Tour”
item.description: 🌟 Bringing back the vibes! 🎶 Get ready to relive the hits with @fettywap on “The Nostalgia Tour” in 2026! 🙌 #FettyWap #NostalgiaTour2026

item.title: Ibeyi Announce New Album Offering
item.description: 🎶 Feel the magic! Ibeyi is blessing us with a new album soon! 🙌✨ #MusicNews #Ibeyi #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Perfume Genius announces more ‘Duo Tour’ dates in UK and North America
item.description: 🎉 Perfume Genius bringing even more magic to the stage! 🎶✨ Check out the new ‘Duo Tour’ dates in UK and North America! 💃🕺 #PerfumeGeniusTourDates

item.title: Levitation 2026 initial lineup (Angine de Poitrine, Die Spitz, Gibby Haynes, Peter Hook & the Light, more)
item.description: 🚀 Prepare your ears for a cosmic experience! Levitation 2026 lineup includes Angine de Poitrine, Die Spitz, Gibby Haynes, and more! 🔥🎶 #Levitation2026 #MusicFestivalVibes

item.title: Snapped: Ultra Music Festival Miami Is a Dance Music Crown Jewel and It’s Here to Stay (A Photo Essay)
item.description: Dive into the vibrant world of Ultra Music Festival Miami 🎶✨ Let the music take you on a journey! 🌴 #UltraMiami #MusicMagic

item.title: The Avalanches – “Together” (Feat. Nikki Nair, Jessy Lanza, & Prentiss)
item.description: ✨ Dance party alert! ✨ The Avalanches drop 'Together' ft. Nikki Nair, Jessy Lanza, & Prentiss – let the good vibes roll! 🎶💃 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Jane Remover Shares Surprise Album As Leroy
item.description: 🎉🎶 Unveiling her musical alter ego! Get ready to groove to Jane Remover's surprise album under the moniker Leroy! 🔥 #MusicSurprise #NewSounds

item.title: Angine de Poitrine Announce New North American Tour Dates
item.description: 🎸 Ready to rock! Angine de Poitrine is hitting the road with new North American tour dates 🎶 Who's catching a show? #livemusic #tourdates

item.title: 16 Horsepower Reunite For First Show In 22 Years
item.description: Guess who's back in the saddle! 🐎🎶 16 Horsepower is reuniting for their first show in 22 years! 🤠 #MusicNews #ReunionVibes

item.title: Gene Announce First North American Tour in 24 Years
item.description: 🎸 Gene is hitting the road in North America after 24 years! Let's rock out together! 🎉 #GeneReunionTour

item.title: KPop Demon Hunters Announce World Tour
item.description: 🌎 KPop's 🔥 Demon Hunters are taking over the world! Who's ready to rock out with them? 🎸 #KPopWorldTour 🌟

item.description: 🎶 Get ready to groove with Flying Lotus at Blue Note NYC & LA! 🎷🎉 #LiveMusic #FlyingLotus

item.title: The Strokes share “Falling Out of Love” from upcoming album
item.description: 🎶 New vibes alert! The Strokes drop a fresh track, "Falling Out of Love," teasing their upcoming album! 🎸 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Foo Fighters Bring Massive Hits to Their First-Ever Tiny Desk
item.description: Rock legends @foofighters take over Tiny Desk for the first time! 🎸🎶 Who else is ready for this musical treat?! #FooFightersTinyDesk

item.description: 🎶 Rock legends U2 drop a sneak peek of "Street Of Dreams" in vibrant Mexico City music video! 🌟 #U2 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Saosin Announce 2026 US Tour Celebrating 20th Anniversary of Debut Album
item.description: 🎉 Saosin is hitting the road in 2026 to celebrate 20 years of epic tunes! Who's joining the party? 🎶 #SaosinTour2026

item.title: Elton John Says New Album Is Unlike Any He’s Previously Created: ‘It’s So Happy’
item.description: 🚀 Elton John bringing the sunshine with his new album ☀️ Let's dance to some happy tunes! 🕺🎶 #EltonJohn #NewMusicAlert

item.description: 🌟 Madonna is back with 'Confessions II' at Tribeca Festival! 🎶 Who's ready to dance with the Queen of Pop? 💃 #Madonna #TribecaFestival

item.title: Italy’s C2C Festival Returned To New York To Remind Us Music Has No Borders
item.description: Italy's C2C Festival brought the international beats back to NYC! 🎶 Let's groove and unite through the power of music! 🌍 #C2CFestival #MusicWithoutBorders

item.description: ✨🎶 Flight of the Conchords rocked their comeback show with epic moments and hilarious mishaps! 🤣👏 #ConchordsComeback #MusicNews

item.description: 🎶 Tricky is hitting the road! Who's ready for some mind-blowing beats across North America? 🌟 #TrickyTour2022 🚗

item.description: 🎸 Step into Beatlemania at the new museum! Let's twist and shout with the Fab Four! 🎶 #TheBeatles #MusicHistory

item.description: 🎶 Rock legends Dave Matthews Band kick off 2026 tour with a deep dive into their classic hits! Who's ready to jam? 🤘 #DMB2026 #MusicLegends

item.description: Phoebe Bridgers is back and better than ever! 🌟🎶 Fresh tunes at her first show in 3 years. Let's groove! #PhoebeIsBack

item.description: Guess who's back, back again! Super Furry Animals are reuniting for a legendary show 🌟🎶 Let's dance like it's 2001!

item.description: 🎶 Feel the funk at Blu DeTiger's SOLD OUT show! 🎸 Want to be there? Stay tuned for your chance to win 2 tickets! 🎟️ #livemusic #giveaway

item.description: 🎉 Vegas, baby! Mary J. Blige is blessing us with 10 more nights of pure soul vibes! Who's ready to groove? 🎶✨ #MaryJBlige #VegasResidency

item.description: Slayyyter is taking over NYC and LA! 🌟 Mark your calendars for a pop extravaganza near you! 🎉 #SlayyyterOnTour
